style.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (99 BPM) G minor track blending smooth synth pads and crisp drum programming with a laid-back hip-hop vocal flow that balances late-night cocktail lounge vibes with the rhythmic precision of coding logic.

sections.text:
Yeah
Uh
Summer night, laptop glow
Little ice in the glass
We working different now
Come on

Ooh, cocktails and code
Ooh, watch the new me load
Ooh, we don’t move like before
No, no, no

Sunset dripping through the blinds like gold
Same little room but the dream got bold
Glass on the table with the ice half low
Got my mind on fire and my laptop glow
I used to scroll when the day went dead
Same old worries running loops in my head
Now I open up a new tab, breathe in slow
Type one question and the whole world grows
I ain’t tryna flex like I know it all
I just stopped waiting on a miracle call
One small build, one clean plan
One more skill in the palm of my hand
AI talking, I’m talking back
Turning little ideas into something that lasts
Summer breeze coming through the screen
Feels like palm trees living in the machine

Mix a little focus with the moonlight
Add a little rhythm to the grind
We don’t have to run from the daylight
We can make a way this time

Cocktails and code
That’s how the night unfolds
Got a little dream in the glass
Got a little fire in the soul
Cocktails and code
Watch the new me load
I can feel that future getting closer
Every time I take control
Sip, sip, type it up
Build, build, level up
No more waiting on the world
We gon’ make it come to us

That’s how the night unfolds
Summer in my source code
Watch the new me load

Na na na, let it run
Na na na, here we come
Na na na, don’t you know
Cocktails and code

I used to think the good life had a gate
Somebody at the front saying wait, wait, wait
Now I see the lock got a pattern to it
Learn a little logic, put some action through it
Debug my doubt, clean up my days
Automate the noise, let the stress drift away
Build me a page, build me a flow
Build me a bridge where the old me won’t go
It ain’t magic, but it feel like that
When the idea hits and the beat comes back
Bassline walking like it knows my name
808 snap like a champagne frame
I want beach chairs paid from the things I made
Not another short break that I barely saved
I want Monday soft, I want time that’s mine
I want sunlight sitting on a better design

sections.raw: Bridge - Female Lead with Group Harmonies
sections.text:
Maybe the beach ain’t far away
Maybe it starts with what I make
Maybe the life I used to chase
Is hiding in the habits I create
No more wishing on the Wi-Fi
No more waiting for the right sky
I got rhythm, I got time
I got something on my mind

Yeah
Prompt me a plan, I’ll put feet on it
Dream looking clean when I keep on it
Small wins stacking like sunlight
One more commit in the midnight
Glass by the keys, breeze at the door
I don’t wanna be tired no more
I don’t wanna just talk that growth
I wanna build that boat and float
